sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, date_col String, value Int32);
SELECT id, toDateOrZero(date_col) AS converted_date FROM test_dates WHERE toDateOrZero(date_col) GLOBAL IN (SELECT toDateOrZero('2022-01-01'));
SELECT id, toDateOrZero(date_col) AS converted_date FROM test_dates GROUP BY converted_date HAVING converted_date >= toDateOrZero('2022-01-01');
CREATE TABLE test_values (value_id UInt32, value_str String);
SELECT a.value_id, a.value_str, toDateOrZero(NULLIF(a.value_str, '')) GLOBAL IN (SELECT toDateOrZero(b.value_str) FROM test_values b WHERE b.value_id = 2) FROM test_values a;
CREATE TABLE temp_results AS SELECT id, toDateOrZero(date_col) AS result_date FROM test_dates;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT result_date FROM temp_results GROUP BY result_date HAVING result_date = toDateOrZero('2021-01-01')) AS subquery;
